title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-contained Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. runner with CLI, REST API and Docker images.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API, published on npm.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama API, installable from PyPI.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter enabling Ollama models as LLM/Chat/Embeddings endpoints.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (chat, admin, RAG) for any Ollama model; runs in Docker.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG template using Ollama + llama-index for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to run and chat with Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with synchronous, async and streaming APIs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed, async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-copilots
summary: VS Code extension that adds local AI copilots powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama with support for threads and streaming.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django package exposing Ollama models as async chat endpoints with SSE.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama, go get github.com/ollama/ollama/api.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Collection of CLI utilities: model downloader, prompt benchmark, chat REPL.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts on notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot with group chat support, streaming and per-user model selection.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration allowing Ollama models as generators & embedders.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot template with RAG using Ollama, ChromaDB and LangChain.
